creator: sue@iwmt.org
text:
Created attachment 171081
lv.diff

Lv's master site was gone because ISP was terminated the service.
I contacted the lv's author, he says "I can't create a new site so busy".
Then I upload lv's source code to GitHub.

Attached diff that changes MAINTAINER address and MASTER_SITES point to GitHub, some related changes also included.
portlint reported that re-generate the patch, attached diffs include the re-generated patch by "make makepatch".
